rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or fixing syntax errors without changing unrelated architecture
generic_rules: Use only valid AGREE syntax and visible identifiers in repairs
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations
Trace unresolved identifiers to their root cause before adding architecture
Remove invalid guarantees instead of fixing them when the root cause is unresolved
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `const` for constants and `eq` for equations in AGREE annexes
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type or implementation scopes
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not reference implementation-level features in component type annexes
Do not add architecture to fix unresolved identifiers; trace and fix the root cause
irrelevant_topics: AGREE pattern chunks that do not directly relate to the current repair task
